name: arc
description: ARC paper, research-domain, and report typesetting tools.

interface.shortDescription: Paper query, research workflows, and PDF typesetting
interface.longDescription: Cache-first ar5iv and INSPIRE paper tools with LLM paper summaries, research-domain construction, and Markdown-to-PDF report typesetting.
defaultPrompt: Build a research domain from arXiv:0911.3380
Convert a Markdown report to PDF
